assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md contains two tables (Stream 2.1.x and Stream 2.2.x) covering all 7 supported versions. Every row shows 'NO' in the Affected? column: 2.1.0 (serde_json 1.0.137), 2.1.1 (1.0.137), 2.2.0 (1.0.138), 2.2.1 (1.0.138), 2.2.2 (1.0.138), 2.2.3 (1.0.139), 2.2.4 (1.0.139). All exceed the fix threshold of 1.0.135. Summary states: 'No supported versions are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 7 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states '## Decision: Case C -- Close as Not a Bug' and under Proposed Jira Actions section 2: 'Resolution: **Not a Bug**'. Under 'Actions NOT Taken': '**No remediation tasks created** -- not needed since no versions are affected'.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '### 1. Add Close Comment' includes a proposed comment with a table listing all 7 versions with their serde_json versions and 'NO' affected status: 2.1.0/1.0.137, 2.1.1/1.0.137, 2.2.0/1.0.138, 2.2.1/1.0.138, 2.2.2/1.0.138, 2.2.3/1.0.139, 2.2.4/1.0.139. States 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 7 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '### 3. Set VEX Justification' explicitly sets the VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345) to 'Component not Present' with rationale: 'The vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not present in any supported product version.' Includes a code example: jira.edit_issue("TC-8002", fields={"customfield_12345": "Component not Present"}).

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 7 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md under 'Actions NOT Taken' explicitly states: '**No remediation tasks created** -- not needed since no versions are affected' and '**No cross-stream remediation** -- no streams are affected, so Case B does not apply'. No remediation task creation appears anywhere in any of the three output files.
